description: The nike Mikumi is a versatile outdoor sandal made with nike design principles. You'll want to enjoy every day at the beach or on the trails when you put on this pair of floaters.UpperTwill straps mounted on rubberForefoot and ankle straps with velcro closuresEmbroidered Nike swoosh on the forefoot strapStraps with light padding for comfortTextured footbed for all day comfortOutsoleRubber cupsole featuring high-performance rubber Multidirectional lugs on the outsoleSandal careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
